content: {"file": "backend/pipeline/nodes/analyze.py", "summary": "This file contains logic for extracting text from a PDF solution design document and performing parallel retrieval of relevant context using RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) across three collections: manuals, codebase, and entities. It handles exceptions during the retrieval process and updates the state with extracted text and retrieved context.", "rules": [{"name": "_extract_pdf_text", "description": "Extracts text from a PDF document by iterating through its pages and returning concatenated page texts.", "conditions": ["pdf_path is provided"], "actions": ["read pdf, extract text from each page, return combined text"]}, {"name": "_doc_to_dict", "description": "Converts a document object into a dictionary containing content and metadata.", "conditions": ["document object is provided"], "actions": ["return dict with 'content' and 'metadata' keys"]}, {"name": "_retrieve", "description": "Asynchronously retrieves similar documents from a vector store based on a query text.", "conditions": ["collection_key, query_text are provided"], "actions": ["get vector store, perform similarity search, return list of document dicts"]}, {"name": "analyze_node", "description": "Extracts solution design document text and performs parallel RAG retrieval across three collections. Updates state with errors if retrieval fails.", "conditions": ["state is provided"], "actions": ["extract pdf text, truncate query text, retrieve context from vector store, update state with retrieved data or error"]}], "dependencies": ["pypdf", "logging", "asyncio", "ingestion.chroma_client", "pipeline.state"]}
